message:
fix(codegen): Migrate assign_comptime.zig to builder API

Migrated all 35 emit calls to ZigBuilder API:
- emitComptimeAssignment() → single builder with flush at end
- Type annotations (i64, f64, bool, string, bytes, list) → b.write()
- Value emission with proper escaping → b.write(), b.writeFmt()
- Character-by-character string escaping → writer.writeByte()

Pattern used:
- const b = try self.getBuilder()
- const writer = b.body.writer(b.allocator) for single-byte writes
- try zig_keywords.writeEscapedIdent(b.body.writer(b.allocator), name)
- try b.write(), try b.writeFmt() for string/formatted output
- const output = b.getBody()
- try self.output.appendSlice(self.allocator, output)

Key technique: Use writer.writeByte(c) for character-by-character
string escaping loops (more efficient than single-char slices).

Tests: unary 13/13, longexp 1/1 ✅

Progress: 11/47 statement files migrated
